posts.topic: MCP as Universal AI Integration Standard
posts.hook: Nobody is talking enough about the protocol layer.
To test an AI, you need an AI.
posts.notes: Informative but lacked engagement. Too long, too many bullets competing equally.

posts.topic: AWS Ships Kiro on Anthropic API, Not Its Own Stack
posts.hook: AWS just admitted its own orchestration layer isn't good enough.
posts.notes: Grounded from IMG20260423132039.jpg — L4 Automator demo slide. Direct quote on slide: 'hand-rolled orchestration loop using the Anthropic Messages API directly'.

posts.topic: AI Rewrites the Architect Role / Context Blindness
posts.hook: AWS built its flagship AI dev tool on a hand-rolled Anthropic Messages API loop — not its own Bedrock Agents.
posts.notes: 3 bullets max, 80-130 word target, emojis as anchors. Grounded from May 5 extracted slides.
